title: Supporting data for manuscript "Quantitative Insights on Impurities in Ice Cores at the Micro-scale from Calibrated LA-ICP-MS Imaging"
author: Bohleber, Pascal
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The datasets are supporting information for the manuscript "Quantitative Insights on Impurities in Ice Cores at the Micro-scale from Calibrated LA-ICP-MS Imaging" submitted for consideration at Geochemistry, Geophysics, Geosystems. Measurements using ice core LA-ICP-MS imaging were performed at the Ca’Foscari University of Venice, for 23Na, 24Mg, 27Al, 56Fe and 88Sr. Impurity maps are acquired as a pattern of lines, without overlap in the direction perpendicular to that of the scan, and without any further spatial interpolation. If denoted as "_calibrated" the files contain concentration values as parts per billion (ppb) after matrix-matched calibration by method B described in the manuscript, using a 40 micron spot. Datasets denoted as "MethodC_" refer to the basic grain growth experiment described in the manuscript (Figure 4). Here uncalibrated intensities are recorded as counts for a 20 micron spot.
steps_raw: The datasets are supporting information for the manuscript "Quantitative Insights on Impurities in Ice Cores at the Micro-scale from Calibrated LA-ICP-MS Imaging" submitted for consideration at Geochemistry, Geophysics, Geosystems. If denoted as "_calibrated" the files contain concentration values as parts per billion (ppb) after matrix-matched calibration by method B described in the manuscript, using a 40 micron spot. Datasets denoted as "MethodC_" refer to the basic grain growth experiment described in the manuscript (Figure 4). Here uncalibrated intensities are recorded as counts for a 20 micron spot.
